generated_oml:
// Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor capturing high‑resolution point clouds for object detection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera providing RGB‑D imagery for stereo perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring wheel velocity for vehicle state monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring steering joint angle for dynamic control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

// Physical-to-Virtual Interaction (Data Transmission)
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidarSensor
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// Data (processed data used by models)
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from the on‑board sensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera image data transmitted from the on‑board camera."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurement transmitted from the speed sensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurement transmitted from the steering sensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

// Models / Data Products
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering of LiDAR point clouds for foreground obstacle detection."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:producedData ClusteringResultData
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter tracking of detected objects using clustering and depth image data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:producedData TrackingStateData
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic compliant with ISO 15622 computing desired speed."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
    DTDFVocab:producedData DesiredSpeedCommandData
]

instance SQLDatabaseStorageModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database for long‑term storage of vehicle state and object tracking logs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance VisualizationMeshModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D mesh representation of the vehicle and surrounding environment for visualization."
]

// Processed Data Products
instance ClusteringResultData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered obstacle positions generated by the DBSCAN algorithm."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TrackingStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "State estimates of tracked objects produced by the Kalman filter."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DesiredSpeedCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired vehicle speed command calculated by the ACC algorithm."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

// Acting Components
instance MotorVoltageActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor voltage actuator translating desired speed into motor voltage commands."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator implementing steering angle commands from the DT."
]

// Enablers (Tools & Middleware)
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware (DDS implementation) delivering real‑time inter‑process messages."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for point‑cloud clustering and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetPackEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK on Jetson Orin Nano for accelerated inference."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime for rapid prototyping of ROS 2 nodes."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CppNodeRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ runtime managing ROS 2 node lifecycle on Jetson"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository hosting source code for version control and CI/CD."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance WiFiNetworkingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi‑Fi networking for inter‑entity communication between physical and virtual twins."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for persistent storage of telemetry and reports."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

// Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring of vehicle state and reporting generation."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReportInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloaded ACC computation and control logic execution."
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedCommandData
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, set speed and issue emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides DisableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides SetDesiredSpeedAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human‑readable reports on object tracks and vehicle performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalysisInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides TroubleshootingReplayInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterTuningReportInsight
]

instance Visualization3DService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization of vehicle and surrounding environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// Insights
instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed report of vehicle speed and steering state over time."
]

instance ObjectTrackReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report of detected and tracked object positions and velocities."
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of ACC performance and safety metrics."
]

instance TroubleshootingReplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Replay of recorded data for debugging and investigation."
]

instance ParameterTuningReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report summarizing tuned ACC parameters and their impact."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live 3‑D visualization of vehicle posture and obstacle locations."
]

// Actions
instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables the Adaptive Cruise Control system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables the Adaptive Cruise Control system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets a desired target speed for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking of the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT—such as desired speed, enable/disable ACC, emergency braking, and steering commands—sent over ROS 2 to the Actuation Functional Entity, which writes motor voltage and steering servo commands to the vehicle’s speed controller and steering actuator."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in real‑time with an end‑to‑end latency of ≤100 ms from vehicle to DT and clock synchronization within 100 ms, enabling ACC computations at each perception cycle (typically on the order of 10 Hz)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An ISO 23247‑inspired architecture comprising a Physical Twin Entity (responsible for data pre‑processing and actuation), a Digital Twin Entity (Data Collection, Data Storage, ACC Controlling, Reporting), a User Entity (3D visualization and control panel interfaces), and a Cross‑System Data Translation Entity connecting them; all entities are implemented as ROS 2 packages, orchestrated through ROS 2 topic and service exchanges over Wi‑Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The system passes through design (specification of DT services and requirements), development (mapping ISO 23247 architecture, implementing ROS 2 nodes), verification & validation (performance tests, latency measurements), and operation (live monitoring and remote control during vehicle runs). The DT represents the vehicle in operation, while the physical twin corresponds to the manufactured vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensured by maintaining <100 ms end‑to‑end latency, clock sync within 100 ms, using verified clustering (DBSCAN) and tracking (Kalman filter) algorithms, and implementing ACC according to ISO 15622; validation is performed through unit tests, latency benchmarking, and offline replay of vehicle state data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication is handled by ROS 2 over DDS (e.g., FastDDS or OpenSplice) on a Wi‑Fi network; inter‑entity messages include ROS 2 topics for LiDAR point clouds, vehicle state, and control commands, while cross‑system translation uses a dedicated Data Translation Functional Entity that serializes and performs unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed across heterogeneous compute nodes: the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano hosts the Physical Twin Entity, a remote edge server or cloud instance hosts the Digital Twin Entity (ACC computation, data storage), and a user workstation runs the User Entity; all nodes run a Linux distribution and ROS 2."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT, ISO 15622 for ACC control logic, ROS 2 open standard for middleware, NVIDIA JetPack SDK, and open‑source repositories ensuring compliance with existing automotive safety standards."
]
